title: normalize_relatedness_v1 — promote a staging_relatedness_v0 envelope to ngsrelate_pairs_v1
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='normalize_relatedness'. Reads a previously-captured staging_relatedness_v0 envelope (by layer_id), maps its rows to the canonical ngsRelate column set, type-coerces, and emits a typed ngsrelate_pairs_v1 envelope. Lineage is preserved via provenance.source_layer_ids. This is the worked example of PIPELINE_FLOW.md §'Reversibility — staging today, normalized tomorrow' for relatedness.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the staging_relatedness_v0 envelope to promote.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias — multi-source converters use this; single-source actions use source_layer_id.

column_map.description: Maps source column names (as they appear in the staging payload's rows) to the canonical ngsrelate_pairs_v1 column names: ind1, ind2, n_sites, theta, king, rab, ibs0, ibs1, ibs2. Defaults match raw ngsRelate output (a→ind1, b→ind2, theta→theta, KING→king, R→rab, nSites→n_sites, IBS0/1/2→ibs0/1/2).
